faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College?
faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College is approximately INR 30000.

faqs.question: Does Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College has a Faculty review rating of 4.22 by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: Does Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College has received an impressive review rating of 3.03 on Placements based on 12 feedback of verified Shiksha students.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 817 students were admitted at Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College and 729 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 729 students 18 were placed with median salary of INR 104500 and 213 students opted for higher studies. A total of 844 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce Collegeand 688 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 688 students 24 were placed with median salary of INR 125000 and 223 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 319 students were admitted at Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College and 283 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 283 students 28 were placed with median salary of INR 560000. A total of 359 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce Collegeand 333 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 333 students 32 were placed with median salary of INR 640000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce, and have a fee structure of around INR 30,000. UG programs include B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Further, the PG programs include MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA.

faqs.answer: A:    Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College is a well-known institution for M.A, M.Com, MBA/PGDM, M.Sc, BBA, B.Com, B.Sc, BCA, B.A, BBM/BMS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College has course specializations in English, Hindi, IT & Systems, Chemistry, Computer Science, Mathematics, Biotechnology, Microbiology.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College?

faqs.answer: A:    Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College provides programmes including M.A, M.Com, MBA/PGDM, M.Sc, BBA, B.Com, B.Sc, BCA, B.A, BBM/BMS in streams such as Humanities & Social Sciences, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Accounting & Commerce, Business & Management Studies, Science, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in English, Hindi, IT & Systems, Chemistry, Computer Science, Mathematics, Biotechnology, Microbiology.

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College goes up to 230.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My experience with my college.

review_content.Placements: 45% of students got placed in my course. I don't know the highest, lowest, and average package offered in my course because placements in our college are little bit hard. I heard that top CGPA students are allowed to sit for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course/department are very good. Wi-Fi is very strong and good connection. Labs are good, neat, and clean. AC rooms are availale. Our classes are very large around 100 students should sit properly in one class. Library is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: College teachers and faculty are amazing and very cooperative.

review_content.Placements: The recruitment process is for fewer candidates. Very few students are allowed to give campus interviews due to the town locality. More students do not get placements as the requirements for the companies are fewer compared to colleges in cities. More companies should be asked for interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is not provided on the college campus. Students coming from outside have to travel or live in private rooms. The canteen is available in the college only for half a day, until lunch. Sports like badminton and cricket are appreciated by the faculty. Medical facilities like first aid are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Best college in Bhusawal City, PONC .

review_content.Placements: Above 75 percent of students are placed in my course. 15 Lacs is the average package offered in my course. IT company and other software development company are recruiting companies for my course. Above 75 percent of students got internships for my course at every company.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, all facilities are best for students. My college infrastructure is good and my college has a separate department for all facilities. There is separate Wi-Fi for all departments. The best modified class room is attached to a projector. The big libraries at my college have all types of books. There is no hostel for my college. The canteen has the best food and cleanliness. The best medical facilities are at my college. All types of sports are played at my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide placement opportunities for BCA students. Our teachers are not professionals. They will do it partially. Our campus is good. Our college has greenery. Our college is good compared to other colleges. It is a good college in our city.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has greenery. Our college has beautiful trees. Labs are good. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are spacious. They are clean. The library is good. It has a reading room.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: If you want your future to be great, you can take admission here.

review_content.Placements: There are 90 percentage of students in our course are placed. The highest package offered is INR 2 lacs per year. There are companies like Infosys, Mahindra and Mahindra. Around 45% of students get the internship from the course and have good fee structure.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good class rooms. Wi-Fi is available in the college. There are labs for every department. Library has a peaceful and silent environment for studying. There and the sports department and has a big hall for playing Badminton.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is one of the best colleges.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys and Mahindra. Almost 45% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are provided with good bench arrangements, fans, and tube lights. Wi-Fi is available in every lab. Computers are provided for students. The food served is good. The sports department has a big badminton court and football ground.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good and knowledgeable. The course curriculum is relevant and makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are easy for toppers.

reviews.review_heading: My experience with my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course/department are very good. Wi-Fi is very strong and good connection. Labs are good, neat, and clean. AC rooms are availale. Our classes are very large around 100 students should sit properly in one class. Library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: College teachers and faculty are amazing and very cooperative.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not provided on the college campus. Students coming from outside have to travel or live in private rooms. The canteen is available in the college only for half a day, until lunch. Sports like badminton and cricket are appreciated by the faculty. Medical facilities like first aid are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Bhusawal City, PONC .
reviews.review_text: In my college, all facilities are best for students. My college infrastructure is good and my college has a separate department for all facilities. There is separate Wi-Fi for all departments. The best modified class room is attached to a projector. The big libraries at my college have all types of books. There is no hostel for my college. The canteen has the best food and cleanliness. The best medical facilities are at my college. All types of sports are played at my college.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has greenery. Our college has beautiful trees. Labs are good. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are spacious. They are clean. The library is good. It has a reading room.

reviews.review_heading: If you want your future to be great, you can take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The college has good class rooms. Wi-Fi is available in the college.  There are labs for every department. Library has a peaceful and silent environment for studying. There and the sports department and has a big hall for playing Badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are provided with good bench arrangements, fans, and tube lights. Wi-Fi is available in every lab. Computers are provided for students. The food served is good. The sports department has a big badminton court and football ground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our campus environment is very good. It has good benches and fans. Wi-Fi is available on our campus. The laboratory is also available. Our library is peaceful for studies. Many computers are available in this college. Hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess is better. Sports are also conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are average. The food served in the canteen is better. Sports facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied but for such a city like Bhusawal, it is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good for this college. As P. O Nahata college Bhusawal is considered one of the oldest and recognised colleges in the city, the infrastructure here is huge and the gardens here are good. And the fountains are great and huge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college is huge, and the quality of the food served is very good. Many labs are available here, and the classrooms are very nice. The library is available, and the canteen is very good. There are also medical facilities, and sports ground is also available. Our department is huge in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure. All the department are very well-maintained, including a library, garden area and canteen. Our college provides free Wi-Fi facility for students.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission in our college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available but not for use. Labs is available but timetable for practical is not confirmed schedule anytime postponed, delayed problem like that and lecture anytime cancel. Suddenly syllabus is over without teacher is not attending a single time lecture.

reviews.review_heading: Great placements were made in 2017.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college was very good, with enough space for a playground. There is a big library containing course-related books. In free time, we use the canteen, and the food is very good. The quality of food (samosas, tea) is excellent. They do not provide mess facility.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bhusawal Arts, Science and P.O. Nahata Commerce College.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were provided. The infrastructure was good. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Computer laboratories, physics laboratories, chemistry laboratories, etc., were available. Classrooms were well-maintained. Several books were available in the library. Mess was available. Canteen was decent in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college with classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and sports.
reviews.review_text: Talking about my course department, I found all the technical facilities in good condition. The infrastructure is well maintained. Facilities like Wi-Fi and the library are also available. The canteen is kept very hygienic and it provided better services and food. Also, the campus has a good environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college conducts good extracurricular activities. It has good teachers and good placements.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students get placed in many companies through Rozgaar Mela, which is a seminar conducted by the college. All students get internships from many companies in the private sector. They gain knowledge and experience. Companies offered a salary package of 2.5 LPA to 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a sports complex with a basketball court, kho-kho ground, volleyball court, badminton court, and cricket ground. Computer labs are well maintained with the latest equipments and technology. There is gym for fitness of students. There are canteens where a variety of fresh food items are present. A well-stocked library is available. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent infrastructure in our college with affordable fees.

review_content.Placements: In our college placements opportunities are very good, many companies came for recruitment process and hire many students from the college to work with company. 50% of students get placed in top companies with average salary package of 3LPA to 6LPA. Salary packages increases every year with valuable amount. All students get internship in many companies for gaining basics and knowledge. Some of the top recruiting companies are Texmo Limited, Yash Tech. , Moodys, Flipkart, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has laboratories facility for various departments, there is modern computer lab with the latest technology with all setups. There is Gym, where many students work out for being healthy and fit, and various types of equipments and materials were present here. There is well stocked library present, where a lot of books are there which helps us for gaining knowledge of any thing. There is canteen facility, the foods are very good and fresh. Varieties of things are present here and really acceptable and tasty. There is medical facility also there for some emergency cases, which helps a lot in illness and also in any kind of injury. There is sports facilities where a lot of sports materials were there, where we play and also practice for different tournaments, various competitions. Our coach guided us a lot.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Psychology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely good college with expert faculty.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students had placements according to their academic participation. There was a private hospital internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel was not open yet, but there was a chance it would open in the future. The college followed strict rules and norms, mainly to help students develop discipline. The surroundings in my college were very neat. We had a ground, auditorium, classrooms, canteen, and everything else.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members were very specialized in the field of psychology, not in other majors. Our faculty members were always pleasant when giving practical and theoretical classes. The syllabus was also based on the basics to provide a complete understanding of the subject. There were three internals and one semester. There were practical and theoretical classes, and practice sessions were given for counseling and psychological tests within the college. The teaching was good, with expertise, and also focused on cultural activities and skill development. All faculty members were highly experienced, and the fees were quite affordable. We had both practical and theoretical classes, and they also provided external training and internships.

review_summary.college_name: Aditya College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best choosing college ever.

content.Placements: I had the opportunity to experience the placement process at BMS College of Engineering, and there's my review based on my experience. The university has a dedicated placement cell that organizes placement drives every semester. The highest package offered is 30 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is located on campus, making it very convenient for attending classes. Rooms are share, and the space isn't huge. It is sufficient for the basic needs of students like a library, a playground, a seminar hall, classrooms, and a canteen. The food provided is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good college according to the fee charges and environment.

content.Placements: Placements at Adhitya College of Engineering are good. Many companies, like Google and other companies, provide placements. We have an internship program every week. Almost 85% of the students get placed here. The highest package was 25-30 LPA, and the lowest was 8.65 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good, and it has nice ventilation. The area around the college is surrounded by greenery, and the scenery is beautiful. classrooms are well-maintained and neat. Labs and library are great, and the nearby hostels are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the good and best college to choose.

content.Placements: The placements are yet to be known because it is newly opened, but the other branches of Aditya College have offered various placements with good packages around 25-30 Lacs per year. Various companies hire the students and the internship field is nice, good to go.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good, well-maintained, and clean. The surrounding areas are wonderful, full of greenery, and the best part is you will have a peaceful site with very good ventilation. According to me, it is good in the fresh greenery area.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computers Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great Support by the Faculty

content.Placements: Students are placed in the best of Indian and multinational corporate sectors, scripting their success stories. Scaling new heights in their careers, students are achieving success in companies like IBM, Oracle, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, HCL, HP, Tech Mahindra, HLL, Reliance, Johnson & Johnson, Tata Motors, Godrej, Nissan Motors, TCS, ICICI Bank, Citi Bank, HDFC, Future Group, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Separate hostels are available for boys and girls. Bus facilities are available and Wi-Fi is provided. Hostels are under CCTV surveillance, with sufficient space for students. Food is served on time and washing machines are available in the hostel. There are options for 2-sharing, 3-sharing and 4-sharing rooms in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good and absolutely nice.

content.Placements: 98% of students were placed. The highest package was 78 LPA, and the lowest was 3 LPA. Recruiting companies were Wipro, TCS, etc. It was a nice course. It was nice to have a seat in my college. We have great friends and family there, and recommend having you at this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our facilities were good. Hostel facilities were good but not well food provided to 75%. Food was good. There were opportunities for sports. Games were very highly played. It was a good college overall.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were very helpful. My teachers were very good. Teaching quality was good. Course curriculum made students ready for the industry, and it was good. The semester exams were very hard but it was good. Highly recommend coming to college and see our facilities and infrastructure. I am very happy. They teach well and they were very helpful. They were friendly with us

paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

Many companies offer great salary packages in metro cities which are hub for IT companies as well as other reputed MNCs. The salary also differs as per the entry level. After gaining experience of 2-5 years, you can expect a salary of 8-12 LPA and then shift from technical to managerial roles.
Know more about -
Engineering Career

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied due to nil placements.

review_content.Placements: You cannot expect any placements in college. Just complete the college and get a degree. No companies visit here for placements. They just have a fake placement cell. Never seen any company visiting the college. Though they show some past records of placements. I didn't see any placement conducted in the college since I have joined.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. It gives you good feeling like having college on hills. There is a Wi-Fi on the campus but only works up to the main building. Labs are not that developed. There are old computers in the computer lab. Science lab doesn't have the latest equipment. Canteen is very poor. Classrooms are okay enough.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET).

review_content.Placements: I got placed in Infosys as a design engineer with a salary package of 3.6 LPA. Now, I am working as a front-end developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is not good. Classrooms do not have proper Wi-Fi. The library is not good. The hostel facilities are not good. The hostel management is not good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are not helpful. Professors don't have enough knowledge. They are good. The course curriculum is good according to the industry. It does not make us ready for the industry. The exam pattern is not good. I secured a 7.29 CGPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: SVPCET is a good college.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of students in our college are placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, and the food is excellent. It is one of the best colleges for students. The library is huge and whatever book you need is in the library.
review_content.Faculty: Core subjects are very difficult, but teachers are helpful during exam time. We must study extremely hard. There are a total of eight semesters. All semesters are difficult, but we need to read, write, and listen carefully to create a good environment for studying in college.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) is a reputed institute for B.Tech, UG Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma, MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 3.9 on faculty and 3.7 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Student life style at SVPCET .

content.Placements: Nearly 80% of the students were placed in the placements with a package of 4 LPA as the minimum package for the students. The highest package is 12 LPA. Almost all of the top companies, like WIPRO, TCS, CTS, HCL, TECH MAHINDRA, etc., visited the campus.
content.Infrastructure: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology, Puttur, has provided students and staff with all the basic amenities with easy access. SVPCET Puttur facilities include boys' hostels, girls' hostels, medical, library, sports and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Compared to other colleges in fee and study, our college is some what better.

content.Placements: In the 3rd year, the college provides TAP (Training and Placement). In that, they will teach programming and soft skills. For all departments, the TAP section will be and in coming to placements, the campus drives will be held based on our talent they will hire.
content.Infrastructure: There are 4 main computer labs in our college and 2 stimulation labs. The infrastructure is good and classrooms and seminar halls are also good. In coming to hostel, it is good and every semester 2 to 3 hostel events will be held and we have to adjust for hostel food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET).

content.Placements: I got placed in Infosys as a design engineer with a salary package of 3.6 LPA. Now, I am working as a front-end developer.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is not good. Classrooms do not have proper Wi-Fi. The library is not good. The hostel facilities are not good. The hostel management is not good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are not helpful. Professors don't have enough knowledge. They are good. The course curriculum is good according to the industry. It does not make us ready for the industry. The exam pattern is not good. I secured a 7.29 CGPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: SVPCET is a good college.

content.Placements: About 75% of students in our college are placed.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, and the food is excellent. It is one of the best colleges for students. The library is huge and whatever book you need is in the library.
content.Faculty: Core subjects are very difficult, but teachers are helpful during exam time. We must study extremely hard. There are a total of eight semesters. All semesters are difficult, but we need to read, write, and listen carefully to create a good environment for studying in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2021.

content.Placements: I'm from the 2021 passed out batch with a mechanical background. Many top companies, like Hyundai and Tech Mahindra, hire people from our college. A good college to get a degree. The average salary package that was offered to us was 3 to 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has an outstanding atmosphere. The college is a little far from town, so there is no noise, there's absolute peace, and a great learning place. There are separate blocks for different batches. It has great infrastructure.

paragraphs: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET) admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in several specialisations.Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET)offers B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 72,000 - 1,63,600. Aspirants have to payINR 70,000 - 1,00,000for PG courses.

reviews.review_heading: Student life style at SVPCET .
reviews.review_text: Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology, Puttur, has provided students and staff with all the basic amenities with easy access. SVPCET Puttur facilities include boys' hostels, girls' hostels, medical, library, sports and many more.

reviews.review_heading: Compared to other colleges in fee and study, our college is some what better.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 main computer labs in our college and 2 stimulation labs. The infrastructure is good and classrooms and seminar halls are also good. In coming to hostel, it is good and every semester 2 to 3 hostel events will be held and we have to adjust for hostel food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Venkatesa Perumal College of Engineering and Technology (SVPCET).
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is not good. Classrooms do not have proper Wi-Fi. The library is not good. The hostel facilities are not good. The hostel management is not good.

reviews.review_heading: SVPCET is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good, and the food is excellent. It is one of the best colleges for students. The library is huge and whatever book you need is in the library.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an outstanding atmosphere. The college is a little far from town, so there is no noise, there's absolute peace, and a great learning place. There are separate blocks for different batches. It has great infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really awesome. You also join it.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure, with the minimum, we have got a lab and library for our department separately and we have good classrooms and they are comfortable there is no Wi-Fi provided but we can access it in hostels. The food is very good and we have a basketball court and a playground.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good environment for studies.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all labs are excellent. Any time Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The food served is very good. It provides each student with one bed and one locker. It provides 3 sharing rooms. There is a canteen inside the college 24x7.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to get placed on campus and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities like proper labs i.e., we have 5 centers for computer labs, and we also have a library. Our campus also has a Wi-Fi facility. We have a physical department where we have many games to play, and we have a canteen and a medical room also.

reviews.review_heading: A well-equipped Engineering College for better placements.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is no fault in the facilities that they provide for us. Everything is absolutely fine like WI-FI, Classrooms and also in Library, we can find anything that we want related to our subjects and also faculty is available for clarification in the library itself. Every student can gain some knowledge about the subjects in labs aslo by experimental way. So, the students can know about the subjects in practical and theoretical ways. And the college hostel is also good, the facilit...

reviews.review_heading: It is a well-organised institution with the best placement support.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and well furnished with all the requirements like Wi-Fi, laboratories, and classrooms are very clean. The library and auditorium are also good. Hostel atmosphere is good, but the food maintenance was not good. The canteen environment is good, and there are poor medical facilities. We have a good space for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I will suggest you join SVPCET college, which is good.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is a digital platform where there are computers and also books. There is a huge study room where we can sit and read books. During 4 years, I stayed in the hostel, and the facilities provided in the hostel were good. They provided Wi-Fi, and the food served was average. In the hostel, there is a safe and secure environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and very good faculty, and the teaching quality is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. B.Tech, M.Tech, Diploma, MBA, and MCA are the available courses in our college. Hostel rooms and food are good. The hostel management cares about students, their studies and behaviour. The students feel like home here.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for you if you want to gain knowledge as well as placements.
reviews.review_text: When compared to other colleges in and around the Chittoor district, SVPCET is one of the good colleges with good lab equipment, a library, and a Wi-Fi connection. I have attended many labs during my course. I have not faced any issues regarding Wi-Fi. In labs like EDC, ACS, and DCS, there are no multiple kits. It may be one or two, but it works well.

reviews.review_heading: Well organised institute with the best placement support.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure was good and well furnished with all requirements like Wi-Fi, library, auditorium, labs, ground. 
The hostel was average with low quality of food and maintenance.  
The canteen environment was nice. Poor medical facilities. Good space for sport's and cultural activities
.

reviews.review_heading: It has a very good peaceful environment, well-experienced teachers and good placements every year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very attractive and good. Our college library has a good infrastructure with a good Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are also good. The hostel is small, and the food served is also average. The canteen has a menu of fried rice, meals, tiffins and snacks. The food served in the canteen is average, and the cost is high compared to outside. Medical facilities are available. Our college ground is small with a basketball court and sports of cricket and volleyball.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Chirala Engineering College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 54,000 to 1,80,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and UG Diploma. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

faqs.answer: A:    Chirala Engineering College is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma, MCA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Chirala Engineering College are Civil Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: What specializations do Chirala Engineering College offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Chirala Engineering College provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma, MCA in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. review_summary.college_name: Chirala Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Think before you join any college.

content.Placements: This year, no companies visited for hiring. Only 10 students got placed that to a paid internship and if their work is satisfactory they will be taken as full-time employees. If we get placed package would be 5 LPA. I'm pursuing MCA course at present we didn't get any placement opportunities in our batch.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good with a capacity of 150 students and a good infrastructure. We also have labs and library which are also very good. The food is not bad and we also have a canteen. We have sports activities in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, good environment, friendly lecturers and good placements.

content.Placements: In my course, maximum 70% students are placed. The highest package is 7.5 LPA; the average package is 4.5 LPA. TCS, Mahindra, Tata, etc. are the top recruiters. 90% students got internship in Hyderabad from GJ SOLUTIONS INDIA PVT LIMITED company last year in diploma. Total 120 students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Wifi is available on every floor initially. Library is very good. Classrooms are also flexible. My college has two types of hostels: one is management hostel, which is managed by the college management and second is the welfare hostel, which is managed by the government.

individual_reviews.title: Good college but disappointed with the placement quality.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are good but not very effective; according to my opinion, placements are very few and packages are average. Only a few students, like 60 to 70 percent, will get placed on placement grounds. Top companies recruit students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Chirala Engineering College.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent in this college because every year placement records are maintained at 80 to 90 percent. In recent placements, 93 percent of the students in my course were placed in good companies, software product or service-based companies like Accenture, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, DBS Technologies, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Voltech, BP, Mindtree, HP, SAP, Oracle. The college provides training for students for both internships and placements by industry experts and special trainers.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a quite good environment and infrastructure that maintains an aura for students, making them feel interested towards studies. Some of the facilities available and provided by the college management are clean classrooms, labs with a sufficient number of systems, a library with a greater number of books and journals which are helpful for students, pure drinking water, an indoor stadium for games, and a huge ground for sports and other activities.

hostel_campus.college_name: Chirala Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostels for both girls and boys. Boys Hostel has 36 rooms and can accommodate about 300 students. Girls hostel has 16 rooms, which can accommodate about 90 students.The hostel rooms are spacious, adequately ventilated, well maintained and furnished with necessary accessories. The hostel runs a mess. A separate TV room and reading room are also provided.

library.description: Spacious library having the collection of more than 38200 volumes, 110 National and 30 International journals and 1020 Specimen copies and 1150 Donated copies of books. It has total capacity of 650 members to sit.

A modem bakery unit and stationery unit are attached to the mess. There is a separate room one each for boys, girls, staff and VIPs’ in the Mess Block to dine.

reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good with a capacity of 150 students and a good infrastructure. We also have labs and library which are also very good. The food is not bad and we also have a canteen. We have sports activities in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good environment, friendly lecturers and good placements.

Wifi is available on every floor initially.
Library is very good.
Classrooms are also flexible.
My college has two types of hostels: one is management hostel, which is managed by the college management and second is the welfare hostel, which is managed by the government.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text:
1. The college is very big and has good grounds. 
Nice classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library are there.
2. A digital library is also there but the books used on campus are very old.
4. The canteen is big but food is average. 
Limited items will be there.
5. There are different canteens and hostels there for management people and government reservation people separately.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but disappointed with the placement quality.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good comparatively and the building blocks also look nice to the eye. The quality of the facilities available in the college is good and a wide range of facilities are provided by the college management. Food is also good in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college has a quite good environment and infrastructure that maintains an aura for students, making them feel interested towards studies. Some of the facilities available and provided by the college management are clean classrooms, labs with a sufficient number of systems, a library with a greater number of books and journals which are helpful for students, pure drinking water, an indoor stadium for games, and a huge ground for sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very bad, and classes are dirty with dust and paper waste; they clean the classrooms weekly once, until then no one cares about it. They usually ask for money as a penalty for not wearing proper uniform or something else and use that money for upgrading and small repairs. The library is there but filled with couples in free time, so students get distracted easily by seeing them and get out of focus. The only thing that is best about the college is they give more priority to gir...

reviews.review_heading: Affordable and efficient college for diploma aspirants.
reviews.review_text: After completion of the diploma, we need to write some competitive exams to get a seat in a good college and this college is also one of the best colleges for engineering. The college has a peaceful environment that makes the students feel interested in their studies without any deviation or disturbance.

reviews.review_heading: Really a good college with values and ethics.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite satisfying in terms of the quality and quantity of the standards that the college is providing. Well-maintained washrooms represent half of the infrastructure maintenance, and the facilities in hostels are average; they have hot water only available at given times, and the taste of food in hostels is only one-time eatable.

reviews.review_heading: Chirala Engineering College is the best for faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure and provides all the facilities required for a student, both academic and personal. In summer, it was much hotter than regular; it is better to fix air conditioning in every class. Cooling water is available during summer so there's no problem with dehydrating ourselves. The quality of facilities in the hostel too good and the food in the canteen was also tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Chirala engineering college review and other information.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are average, and some of the facilities include labs, Wi-Fi, mineral-purified drinking water, library, gym, indoor playroom, dedicated placement cell, digital projector for e-learning, and well-maintained washrooms. The quality of facilities in the college hostel is affordable and comfortable, and the quality of food is also good at both the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are not available but are located nearby. Sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college provides better infrastructure that includes labs with systems and equipment, Wi-Fi, and digital boards for students. The classrooms are clean and neat for academics. The library is also good and pleasant. The hostel provides 24-hour Wi-Fi and water facilities, and the taste of the food is average, not as much as expected. The fee of the hostel is reasonable for the facilities. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and buildings are well maintained by the college management. Facilities like the library, well-maintained grounds for sports and games, and social activities like NCC and NSS sub-units for physical fitness and discipline. The quality of food in the canteen was not very good but acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: College provides good infrastructure that includes Wi-Fi, labs with equipment, and some basic needs. The classrooms contain digital boards for students. The college has a library with academic and curriculum-related textbooks and some interesting books for students. The hostel also provides 24-hour Wi-Fi and water facilities for students, and the food is about average. And the hostel fee is manageable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The quality of infrastructure and facilities is not good. If any damage occurs to the building due to rains or other issues, they cover it with paint, and that's it; they won't even try to repair it until a major issue happens. The quality of food is very poor in the canteen; they are very commercial and charge more than the actual price. The hostel is also very bad; do not join the hostel. It is better to stay at home than in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college was superb, spread over 36 acres with a huge ground specially designated for sports and games. The college also provides other extracurricular activities like NCC and NSS. The academic blocks are in a rectangular shape, resembling a royal palace, although it's not actually one. admission_process.title: Centre for Management and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Centre for Management and Technologyadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers BBA and PGDM courses at the UG and PG level. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. To get admitted to CMT, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute.The application process atCentre for Management and Technologyis conducted online. Read the article to know more about theCentre for Management and Technologycourse admission2025.

CMT course admissionis completely merit-based & entrance exam-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the college must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Candidates looking for course admission must complete Class 12 in one attempt. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of theCentre for Management and Technology courses:
MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT/ATMA/APICET

Centre for Management and Technology admissionsare based on entrance and merit per the course requirements. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at the Centre for Management and Technology is as follows:
STEP 1: Centre for Management and Technology Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to all programmes, aspirants must apply at the official website. Candidates have to fill up all the details carefully, such as name, mobile number, name of the state, etc. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute selects candidates based on the entrance exam for the MBA course and on merit for the BBA course. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theCentre for Management and Technology feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

placement_data.title: Centre for Management and Technology Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Centre for Management and Technology (CMT) has a placement team that looks after the placement activities on a full-time and continuous basis. The team helps in shaping the careers of students from their induction and orientation, summer internships, mid-term projects, right to their final placements.

Recently, the highest and average packages offered during the Centre for Management and Technology placements 2024 stood at INR 10 LPA and INR 4.2 LPA, respectively. Each student received an average of 2 multiple offers during the 2024 placement drive. A total of 62 companies visited the campus in 2024 and provided job offers in various domains. Additionally, the highest stipend offered to the students during the internship placements stood at INR 7.2 LPA . Some of the top recruiters of the Centre for Management and Technology include Chegg, Indigo, L&T, Tech Mahindra, Hyundai, Coca Cola, Dabur, Dell, Asian Paints, Fab India, Google, TCI, Genpact, IBM, etc.

review_content.Placements: The placements on the campus are good. In the senior batch, it was some light, but in our batch, it makes a boom. The students are getting at least 60% at all. The highest salary offered was 3.5 LPA. Mainly, they provide a role for the chef and the other hotel staff. Almost, 65% of the students got the internship from the college. The college has a placement cell.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is completely the Wi-Fi zone. It has a library contains books(course books and the other supplementary books), magazines, newspapers, and the other reading materials. The classroom is good at ground floor but at the second and third floor it slightly dirty. The medical facilities are available. The labs of hospitality are good. It's true that we faced a lot of complications during the college period.

college_info.college_name: VSM College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The AP ICET 2026 registration portal will now remain open for the VSM College admission to the MBA/PGDM course till Mar 17, 2026, without a late fee. The exam for the same is scheduled to take place on May 2, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    VSM College provides programmes including M.Sc, After 10th Diploma, M.A, B.Sc, B.Com, B.Voc, BBA, BCA, MCA, MBA/PGDM in streams such as Science, Engineering, Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Nursing, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Biology, Physics, Chemistry, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Botany, Zoology.
faqs.question: Which courses does VSM College offer?

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good teachers and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placements. Many students get internships. Top recruiting companies like Infosys, Hexaware, etc., visit our campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. Our department is good. The quality of food in the canteen is average.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are good. They are helpful and friendly. The teaching quality is good. Semester exams are good. The pass percentage is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty members, good placements in 2020, good labs and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: VSM college offers placements for students and also for the students outside the college. The annual package offered is not much high. The package offered was 2.16 LPA when we were studying, and the lowest package was 1.32 LPA. Companies that came to our college were NICE, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Divis and some other companies. The roles offered to us are production supply and data entry.
review_content.Infrastructure: VSM campus is huge. It has a library, good classrooms, digital computer labs and chemical labs, but the hostel is not much good. The college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi. The college has a very small canteen and a medical room. The college has a huge playground, and we can play cricket and basketball. A gym is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is really good.

review_content.Placements: Based upon the EAMCET rank, the course is placed first preference CSE, second ECE, third IT, fourth mechanical, fifth civil. The highest salary offered is 1 Lac per month. The lowest offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. Top recruiters are Tata Consultancy Services and Capgemini. The highest salary package offered is 13 LPA. The average salary package offered is 7 LPA. Almost 75% of the students get an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities in our block. Individually, we have subject-related labs. Classrooms are huge, and there are almost 60 students in each class. We have a library for all groups and individual library in each block. The quality of the food served was good but not too good.

review_summary.college_name: VSM College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Organic Chemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: VSM College and my college life

content.Placements: About 96% of our students got job placements from our courses. Various renowned companies from around the world came for recruitment at our college. Not only placements, but our college also arranged well-organized internships, which helped our students get good positions in various companies in the future.
content.Infrastructure: No one had any problem with our college’s infrastructure. Our college classrooms were very well-equipped with smart boards, modern computers, and Wi-Fi. Our college had a separate segment not only for studies but also for various cultural events. Every year, the college held an annual sports day, for which everyone was regularly involved in different sports.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Organic Chemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: VSM College is an excellent institution.

content.Placements: Placement assistance at our college was excellent. Our college provided very good placement support and placed great emphasis on skill development. It also provided internships at various renowned companies which helped us to be fully prepared for our future jobs. The college placed great emphasis on practical experience, and the programs were structured accordingly. Various renowned companies were invited to recruit capable students.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms and infrastructure were beautiful in our college. The entire college campus, including the hostels, was covered by Wi-Fi. Our labs were very well-equipped with all modern technology and necessary supplies. Apart from this, our college also had a beautiful library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teachers and infrastructure.

content.Faculty: Our teachers are good. They are helpful and friendly. The teaching quality is good. Semester exams are good. The pass percentage is good.

The roles offered to us are production supply and data entry.
content.Infrastructure: VSM campus is huge. It has a library, good classrooms, digital computer labs and chemical labs, but the hostel is not much good. The college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi. The college has a very small canteen and a medical room. The college has a huge playground, and we can play cricket and basketball. A gym is also available.

admission_overview.college_name: VSM College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: VSM College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, VSM College considers scores in AP PGCET, APICET, and BIEAP for admission to specific courses.VSM Collegeoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 45,000 - 89,100. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 30,200 - 89,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities in our block. Individually, we have subject-related labs. Classrooms are huge, and there are almost 60 students in each class. We have a library for all groups and individual library in each block. The quality of the food served was good but not too good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: VSM college is highly appreciated for its quality labs and infrastructure. Lab assistants are very good at coordinating with the students. The library is spread over two floors, and it has all the required books. They conduct games during the events. The hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good College and teaching staff but there is no placements ( no campus recruiting).
reviews.review_text: Excellent Labs. Classrooms also too good. Total infrastructure is too nice. No games available. Food will be nice in hostel. Canteen food is not at all good. Laboratory wise very good infrastructure. Excellent teaching staff. Library also all students can use for very less cost.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied over all good experience.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is offered for only girls hostel infrastructure are very good and also high-speed Wi-Fi is available. In college infrastructure is also good computer labs Chemistry labs and Physics labs botany and Zoology labs also available over all good at labs and infrastructure conteen is also very good taste of bond are very tasty I liked it gries price noodles. Are very good drinks and water bottle cost are very reasonable sports are conducted very largely vsm college has a ground 2 acres ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college in the world.
reviews.review_text: All colleges have Wi-Fi facilities, well-developed labs, and classrooms that are good and always open for all without a password; it is common for everyone. The hostel is very nice in our college, and the canteen is excellent. They also focus on sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a good college for UG & PG courses.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best computer in our section. Each one had one computer in the lab and we have special books for coding in the library and also they are providing a lot of games. We had a big playground for cricket, basketball, through ball, shuttle, kabaddi, and we had some sitting games like chess, carrom, and etc. Our college canteen was also good and hostels maintenance was above average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not good for students who want to develop themselves.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides comfortable benches, working labs, unique computer per student, the central library with all kinds of textbooks related to your subjects and well-furnished classrooms. Air-conditioners are not available in the classrooms. A playground is also available if you are a sportsperson.

reviews.review_heading: Very mixed opinions about this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college had very decent infrastructure. But the library could have been better and a slight improvement of the water facility may considered. The benches were the most irritable things I have ever seen in my entire life, they bring nightmares to me, back pain. Rest of us were all good.

reviews.review_heading: My legal opinion on college.
reviews.review_text: It is a good college for day scholars but has no hostel facilities for boys and good facilities for girls with the benefits of Wi-Fi. Classrooms are not good. In the library we expect books and sports to be held at least weekly once.

paragraphs: Admission at IIHM - Imperial Institute Of Hotel Management are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG and PG level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inIIHM - Imperial Institute Of Hotel Management, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include CBSE 12th and PSEB 12th, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria.
